name: Portfolio Rebalancer (Sui)
description: Monitors a target token price on Cetus DEX (Sui) and rebalances holdings via swaps when price hits configurable high or low thresholds. Grid-trading style: sell into strength, buy into weakness.
author: holonym-foundation

envVars.description: Sui type string for the target token (e.g. 0x2::sui::SUI)
Sui type string for the quote token (e.g. 0xdba34672e30cb065b1f93e3ab55318768fd6fef66c15942c9f7cb846e2f900e7::usdc::USDC)
Target USD value of the target token to maintain after each rebalance
Price above which the agent sells target token (e.g. 4.50 for SUI at $4.50)
Price below which the agent buys target token (e.g. 3.00 for SUI at $3.00)
Cetus pool object ID for the target/quote pair (e.g. SUI/USDC: 0xb8d7d9e66a60c239e7a60110efcf8de6c705580ed924d0dde141f4a0e2c90105)
Maximum slippage in basis points for swaps (default 50 = 0.5%)
Sui RPC endpoint (defaults to @mysten/sui mainnet fullnode)
Override the Sui wallet address (bypass waap-cli whoami)
